article.title: Uber OA
article.content:
Hi Everyone,
I give Uber OA for SDE 1 hiring drive. for those who attempted:

- How many Questions were you able to solve?
- How would you rate the difficulty level?

Does anyone have insights about selection criteria?

post.content:
I saw someone on reddit solving all 3 :sob:
I solved 2 and 1 partial. 
mine were - biohazard, autocomplete, mincostpath. 

will 2 full and 1 8/12 pass OA???
Has anyone received other updates regarding
I solved 12/15 TC for q1, q2 fully solved  and q3 8/15 solved \uD83D\uDE41
Any update for anyone on netx round other than waiting list?
Can u guys share what type questions they were?
do you guys think it was an OA for everyone that applied or for people who actually passed the resume screening
When did you guys receive the test link?
all 3 questions i was managed to solve

Hii 

The questions were medium to hard

i could only solve 1 question completely and other one only half
Only one question i was able to solve U??
